overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded assassin running through a sun-drenched medieval Middle Eastern market city with mud-brick architecture, bustling vendors, and palm-lined streets transitioning to ancient ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees approaching market entrance

events.description: character runs under fabric awning entering covered market area

agents.ego_description: running through sunlit plaza toward shaded market entrance

entered.detail: tall palm tree with green fronds casting shadows on the ground
multi-story building with wooden balconies and green banners
stone archway with blue tile decoration and wooden door
dark fabric canopy stretching across the street entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sun-drenched plaza with palm trees and traditional mud-brick buildings. The character runs forward, passing dried bushes and approaching a covered market entrance marked by a fabric awning.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street with hanging fabrics and pottery stalls

events.description: camel with rider passes from right to left across the path

agents.ego_description: running through covered market street passing vendors and shoppers

notable_agents.action: camel with rider decorated with red saddle cloth walking past the character

entered.detail: wooden stall displaying large clay pots and urns
large stone arch marking the end of the covered market

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a semi-covered market street shaded by fabric awnings. Pottery stalls line the right side while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. A camel with a rider crosses the path from right to left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market square with pottery vendors and clay jars

events.description: character turns right to navigate around pottery displays

agents.ego_description: navigating through crowded market square filled with pottery vendors and large clay jars

notable_agents.action: vendor in dark robes tending to clay pottery display

entered.detail: large terracotta storage jars arranged on the ground around stalls
wooden cart loaded with goods and covered with fabric
canopied stall with various goods on display

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a bright open market square, the character navigates around large clay jars and pottery displays. The area is bustling with vendors and shoppers under the harsh midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow winding street with stone walls and residential buildings

events.description: encounter group of guards in red uniforms patrolling the street

agents.ego_description: running through narrow alleyways passing guards and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: guard in red uniform and helmet standing watch in the path
pedestrian in grey robes walking alongside the character

entered.detail: rough stone block walls of narrow alleyway
colorful fabrics hanging between buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed street with high stone walls and wooden scaffolding. The lighting becomes more diffused in the shadows. Guards in red uniforms appear ahead, standing watch among the pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: street opening to ancient ruins with tall stone columns

events.description: emerging from narrow street into open plaza with ancient columns

agents.ego_description: running toward open plaza with ancient ruins visible ahead

notable_agents.action: guard in red uniform watching the street from the side

entered.detail: tall stone columns of ancient ruins rising in the distance
crumbling stone walls of old structures

segments.scene_description: The street opens up as the character approaches an open plaza featuring ancient ruins. Tall stone columns and crumbling walls become visible ahead, marking a transition from the market district to an archaeological area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a bright, open plaza into the shaded depths of a market street before emerging back into a bustling sun-drenched square. It begins in a sun-drenched plaza characterized by palm trees and mud-brick buildings, moving past dried bushes toward a fabric-covered entrance. As the camera passes under the awning, the environment shifts into a semi-covered street where pottery stalls line the path and a camel with a rider crosses the way. The scene then opens up as the character exits the shade and enters a bright market square, navigating around large clay jars and pottery displays. Finally, the shot expands to reveal a crowded hub of vendors and shoppers under the harsh midday sun.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic urban alleyway into a wide, ancient archaeological plaza. It begins as the character enters a narrow enclosed street, where high stone walls and wooden scaffolding cast diffused shadows over the path. As the camera moves forward, guards in red uniforms emerge among the pedestrians, marking a point of tension within the tight corridor. The scene then opens and expands as the character exits the alley, shifting from the dense market district toward a bright, open space. Finally, the view reveals a landscape of crumbling walls and tall stone columns, completing the transition into the ruins.
